about.title: About
about.intro:
Esteban Fichet, 22, based in Dijon.
Passionate about development, I design performant web and mobile applications by combining technical rigor with a strong focus on user needs.
Curious and self-driven, I'm able to manage a project end-to-end — from requirements analysis to production — but also to step into an existing project to improve what's there or build new features.
about.approach:
I see every project as an opportunity to grow, both technically and as a professional. For me, every project is first and foremost a product: understand the business needs, then design a clean, modern architecture built to last.
I pay close attention to code readability and fast delivery cycles so I can move forward efficiently with the client and build something that truly meets their needs.
